certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making
Insufficient transparency in contract negotiation and agreement renewal processes
No clear criteria for supplier selection and evaluation
Unclear roles and responsibilities for human oversight and intervention
recommendations: Implement a risk management framework to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks associated with AI-driven contract management
Develop transparent and explainable contract negotiation and agreement renewal processes
Establish clear criteria for supplier selection and evaluation, including compliance with GxP and GDP regulations where applicable
Define and document roles and responsibilities for human oversight and intervention in AI-driven contract management processes

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI decision-making

conditions: EU AI Act gaps noted (non-blocking): art_9, art_10, art_11
